commands.statement: MATCH (movie:Movie) RETURN movie.title AS title, labels(movie) AS labels, movie.released AS released ORDER BY title LIMIT 5
MATCH (person:Person) RETURN person ORDER BY person.name LIMIT 10
MATCH (person:Person)-[relationship]->(movie:Movie) RETURN person.name AS personName, type(relationship) AS relationshipType, movie.title AS movieTitle ORDER BY personName, movieTitle LIMIT 10

MATCH (actor:Person {name: $ActorName})-[:ACTED_IN]->(movie:Movie)<-[:ACTED_IN]-(coActor:Person) WHERE coActor.name <> actor.name RETURN movie.title AS movieTitle, collect(coActor.name) AS coActors ORDER BY movieTitle
MATCH (person:Person {name: $PersonName}) RETURN person.name AS name, person.born AS born, labels(person) AS labels
MATCH (movie:Movie) WHERE movie.released >= toInteger($ReleasedAfter) RETURN movie.title AS title, movie.released AS released ORDER BY released, title LIMIT 10
MATCH (actor:Person) WHERE actor.name IN [$FirstActorName, $SecondActorName] RETURN actor.name AS actorName, actor.born AS born ORDER BY actorName
